name: Industrial Use Distilled Spirits Packaging Authorization

eligibility.description: Must be a dealer as defined in section 5121(c) engaged in the business of supplying distilled spirits for industrial purposes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Dealers may be authorized to package tax-paid distilled spirits in larger containers (1 to 5 gallons) specifically for industrial uses, facilitating bulk supply operations.
